paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% change versus the prior close and a -36.32% change over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours, with recent headlines including "Fermi (FRMI) Is Down 19.0% After Director Exit Over Governance And $375M Convertibles Deal - Has The Bull Case Changed?" from simplywall.st and "Does Fermi (FRMI) Convertible Push Expose Deeper Governance Tensions Around Project Matador?" from Yahoo Finance. These articles discuss the resignation of director designee Miles Everson and the completion of a $375 million offering of convertible senior notes.

There have been various SEC filings, including 8-K forms disclosing the issuance of convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson, as well as a SCHEDULE 13D/A and a DFAN14A form. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 3 new social posts in the last 24 hours, with users discussing the stock's potential movement.
